hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Git commit completed. If the commit changes any publishable package, create a changeset now. Do NOT run `pnpm changeset add` (interactive TUI). Instead write a `.changeset/<kebab-case-name>.md` file yourself: YAML frontmatter mapping each affected package to a bump type (patch/minor/major), then a one-sentence summary for the changelog. Include it in the same commit when possible (stage it before committing, or `git commit --amend --no-edit`). Skip only when nothing publishable changed (repo tooling, tests, docs, packages in the changeset ignore list) or the user explicitly says no changeset is needed."}}' || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; pnpm exec oxfmt "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.mts|*.cts|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) LINT=$(pnpm exec oxlint "$f" 2>&1); echo "$LINT" | grep -qE 'warning|error' && jq -n --arg ctx "Lint issues found in $f — fix before finishing:\n$LINT" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}' || true ;; esac; exit 0
